title: C++ code giải bài top 1

blocks.text: #include <bits/stdc++.h>using namespace std;struct Vec3{ double x=0,y=0,z=0; };static inline Vec3 operator+(const Vec3&a,const Vec3&b){return {a.x+b.x,a.y+b.y,a.z+b.z};}static inline Vec3 operator-(const Vec3&a,const Vec3&b){return {a.x-b.x,a.y-b.y,a.z-b.z};}static inline Vec3 operator*(const Vec3&a,double s){return {a.x*s,a.y*s,a.z*s};}static inline Vec3 operator/(const Vec3&a,double s){return {a.x/s,a.y/s,a.z/s};}static inline double dot3(const Vec3&a,const Vec3&b){return a.x*b.x+a.y*b.y+a.z*b.z;}static inline Vec3 cross3(const Vec3&a,const Vec3&b){return {a.y*b.z-a.z*b.y,a.z*b.x-a.x*b.z,a.x*b.y-a.y*b.x};}static inline double norm2(const Vec3&a){return dot3(a,a);} static inline double norm3(const Vec3&a){return sqrt(norm2(a));}static inline Vec3 normalize3(const Vec3&a){ double n=norm3(a); if(n<=0) return {0,0,0}; return a*(1.0/n); }struct Face{ int a,b,c; };static int N0=0,M0=0;static vector<Vec3> OP;static vector<Face> OF;static double DIAG=1.0;static chrono::steady_clock::time_point T0;static inline double elapsed(){return chrono::duration<double>(chrono::steady_clock::now()-T0).count();}struct FastInput{    vector<char> buf; char *p=nullptr;    FastInput(){        buf.reserve(1<<27); char chunk[1<<16]; size_t n;        while((n=fread(chunk,1,sizeof(chunk),stdin))>0) buf.insert(buf.end(),chunk,chunk+n);        buf.push_back('\0'); p=buf.data();    }    inline void skip(){ while(*p==' '||*p=='\n'||*p=='\r'||*p=='\t') ++p; }    long nextLong(){ skip(); return strtol(p,&p,10); }    double nextDouble(){ skip(); return strtod(p,&p); }    char nextChar(){ skip(); return *p++; }};static void readInput(){    FastInput in;    N0=(int)in.nextLong(); M0=(int)in.nextLong();    OP.resize(N0); OF.resize(M0);    Vec3 mn{1e100,1e100,1e100}, mx{-1e100,-1e100,-1e100};    for(int i=0;i<N0;i++){        (void)in.nextChar();        OP[i].x=in.nextDouble(); OP[i].y=in.nextDouble(); OP[i].z=in.nextDouble();        mn.x=min(mn.x,OP[i].x); mn.y=min(mn.y,OP[i].y); mn.z=min(mn.z,OP[i].z);        mx.x=max(mx.x,OP[i].x); mx.y=max(mx.y,OP[i].y); mx.z=max(mx.z,OP[i].z);    }    DIAG=norm3(mx-mn); if(!(DIAG>0)) DIAG=1.0;    for(int i=0;i<M0;i++){        (void)in.nextChar();        OF[i].a=(int)in.nextLong()-1; OF[i].b=(int)in.nextLong()-1; OF[i].c=(int)in.nextLong()-1;    }}static inline unsigned long long edgeKey(int a,int b){ if(a>b) swap(a,b); return (unsigned long long)(unsigned int)a<<32 | (unsigned int)b; }static inline array<int,3> triSorted(int a,int b,int c){ array<int,3> t{a,b,c}; sort(t.begin(),t.end()); return t; }static inline unsigned long long triKey21(int a,int b,int c){ if(a>b)swap(a,b); if(b>c)swap(b,c); if(a>b)swap(a,b); return ((unsigned long long)(unsigned int)a<<42)^((unsigned long long)(unsigned int)b<<21)^(unsigned int)c; }struct DSU{    vector<int> p,sz;    DSU(int n=0){init(n);} void init(int n){p.resize(n); sz.assign(n,1); iota(p.begin(),p.end(),0);}     int find(int x){while(p[x]!=x){p[x]=p[p[x]]; x=p[x];} return x;}    void unite(int a,int b){a=find(a);b=find(b); if(a==b)return; if(sz[a]<sz[b]) swap(a,b); p[b]=a; sz[a]+=sz[b];}};static bool validateMesh(const vector<Vec3>&P,const vector<Face>&F,bool requireConnected=true){    int n=(int)P.size(), m=(int)F.size();    if(n<1||m<4) return false;    vector<unsigned char> used(n,0);    vector<pair<unsigned long long,int>> E; E.reserve((size_t)m*3);    const double eps=max(1e-30,1e-24*DIAG*DIAG);    for(int i=0;i<m;i++){        int a=F[i].a,b=F[i].b,c=F[i].c;        if(a<0||b<0||c<0||a>=n||b>=n||c>=n) return false;        if(a==b||a==c||b==c) return false;        if(norm2(cross3(P[b]-P[a],P[c]-P[a]))<=eps) return false;        used[a]=used[b]=used[c]=1;        E.push_back({edgeKey(a,b),i}); E.push_back({edgeKey(b,c),i}); E.push_back({edgeKey(c,a),i});    }    for(int i=0;i<n;i++) if(!used[i]) return false;    sort(E.begin(),E.end(),[](auto&a,auto&b){return a.first<b.first;});    DSU dsu(m);    for(size_t i=0;i<E.size();){        size_t j=i+1; while(j<E.size() && E[j].first==E[i].first) ++j;        if(j-i!=2) return false;        dsu.unite(E[i].second,E[i+1].second);        i=j;    }    if(requireConnected && m>0){        int r=dsu.find(0); for(int i=1;i<m;i++) if(dsu.find(i)!=r) return false;    }    return true;}struct ViewImage{    int R=0;    vector<float> ch[4];    vector<unsigned char> fg;};struct CacheEntry{ int R=0; vector<ViewImage> views; };static vector<CacheEntry> origCache;static inline void projectPoint(const Vec3&p,int view,double f,double c,double &sx,double &sy,double &z){    double x=0,y=0;    const double D=2.5;    switch(view){        case 0: z=D-p.x; x=-p.z; y=p.y; break;        case 1: z=D+p.x; x=p.z;  y=p.y; break;        case 2: z=D-p.y; x=p.x;  y=p.z; break;        case 3: z=D+p.y; x=p.x;  y=-p.z; break;        case 4: z=D-p.z; x=p.x;  y=p.y; break;        default:z=D+p.z; x=-p.x; y=p.y; break;    }    sx=f*x/z+c; sy=f*y/z+c;}static vector<ViewImage> renderMesh(const vector<Vec3>&P,const vector<Face>&F,int R){    vector<ViewImage> out(6);    const double f=800.0*R/1024.0, cc=R*0.5;    for(int v=0;v<6;v++){        out[v].R=R; out[v].fg.assign((size_t)R*R,0);        for(int k=0;k<3;k++) out[v].ch[k].assign((size_t)R*R,127.5f);        out[v].ch[3].assign((size_t)R*R,255.0f);    }    const double eps=1e-12;    for(const Face&fa:F){        const Vec3 &A=P[fa.a], &B=P[fa.b], &C=P[fa.c];        Vec3 nn=normalize3(cross3(B-A,C-A));        float nr[3]={(float)((nn.x+1.0)*127.5),(float)((nn.y+1.0)*127.5),(float)((nn.z+1.0)*127.5)};        for(int view=0;view<6;view++){            double x0,y0,z0,x1,y1,z1,x2,y2,z2;            projectPoint(A,view,f,cc,x0,y0,z0); projectPoint(B,view,f,cc,x1,y1,z1); projectPoint(C,view,f,cc,x2,y2,z2);            if(z0<=0||z1<=0||z2<=0) continue;            double den=(y1-y2)*(x0-x2)+(x2-x1)*(y0-y2);            if(fabs(den)<eps) continue;            int minx=max(0,(int)floor(min({x0,x1,x2})-1));            int maxx=min(R-1,(int)ceil (max({x0,x1,x2})+1));            int miny=max(0,(int)floor(min({y0,y1,y2})-1));            int maxy=min(R-1,(int)ceil (max({y0,y1,y2})+1));            if(minx>maxx||miny>maxy) continue;            ViewImage &im=out[view];            for(int yy=miny;yy<=maxy;yy++){                double py=yy+0.5;                for(int xx=minx;xx<=maxx;xx++){                    double px=xx+0.5;                    double w0=((y1-y2)*(px-x2)+(x2-x1)*(py-y2))/den;                    double w1=((y2-y0)*(px-x2)+(x0-x2)*(py-y2))/den;                    double w2=1.0-w0-w1;                    if(w0>=-1e-7 && w1>=-1e-7 && w2>=-1e-7){                        double inv=w0/z0+w1/z1+w2/z2;                        if(inv<=0) continue;                        float dep=(float)(1.0/inv);                        int id=yy*R+xx;                        if(dep<im.ch[3][id]){                            im.ch[3][id]=dep; im.fg[id]=1;                            im.ch[0][id]=nr[0]; im.ch[1][id]=nr[1]; im.ch[2][id]=nr[2];                        }                    }                }            }        }        if((fa.a&262143)==17 && elapsed()>20.25) break;    }    return out;}static const vector<ViewImage>& getOrigRender(int R){    for(auto &e:origCache) if(e.R==R) return e.views;    CacheEntry e; e.R=R; e.views=renderMesh(OP,OF,R); origCache.push_back(std::move(e));    return origCache.back().views;}static double ssimChannelWindowed(const ViewImage&A,const ViewImage&B,int ch){    int R=A.R, W=R+1; const int rad=5;    vector<double> SX((size_t)W*W,0), SY((size_t)W*W,0), SXX((size_t)W*W,0), SYY((size_t)W*W,0), SXY((size_t)W*W,0);    auto at=[&](vector<double>&S,int y,int x)->double&{return S[(size_t)y*W+x];};    for(int y=0;y<R;y++){        double rx=0,ry=0,rxx=0,ryy=0,rxy=0;        for(int x=0;x<R;x++){            int id=y*R+x; double vx=A.ch[ch][id], vy=B.ch[ch][id];            rx+=vx; ry+=vy; rxx+=vx*vx; ryy+=vy*vy; rxy+=vx*vy;            at(SX,y+1,x+1)=at(SX,y,x+1)+rx; at(SY,y+1,x+1)=at(SY,y,x+1)+ry;            at(SXX,y+1,x+1)=at(SXX,y,x+1)+rxx; at(SYY,y+1,x+1)=at(SYY,y,x+1)+ryy; at(SXY,y+1,x+1)=at(SXY,y,x+1)+rxy;        }    }    auto sumRect=[&](const vector<double>&S,int y0,int x0,int y1,int x1){        return S[(size_t)y1*W+x1]-S[(size_t)y0*W+x1]-S[(size_t)y1*W+x0]+S[(size_t)y0*W+x0];    };    const double c1=6.5025, c2=58.5225;    double total=0; int cnt=0;    for(int y=0;y<R;y++) for(int x=0;x<R;x++){        int id=y*R+x; if(!A.fg[id] && !B.fg[id]) continue;        int y0=max(0,y-rad), y1=min(R,y+rad+1), x0=max(0,x-rad), x1=min(R,x+rad+1);        double n=(double)(y1-y0)*(x1-x0);        double sx=sumRect(SX,y0,x0,y1,x1), sy=sumRect(SY,y0,x0,y1,x1);        double sxx=sumRect(SXX,y0,x0,y1,x1), syy=sumRect(SYY,y0,x0,y1,x1), sxy=sumRect(SXY,y0,x0,y1,x1);        double mux=sx/n, muy=sy/n;        double vx=max(0.0,sxx/n-mux*mux), vy=max(0.0,syy/n-muy*muy), cov=sxy/n-mux*muy;        double num=(2*mux*muy+c1)*(2*cov+c2);        double den=(mux*mux+muy*muy+c1)*(vx+vy+c2);        total += den!=0 ? num/den : 1.0;        cnt++;    }    if(cnt==0) return 1.0;    return max(0.0,min(1.0,total/cnt));}static double proxyScore(const vector<Vec3>&P,const vector<Face>&F,int R){    const auto &A=getOrigRender(R);    auto B=renderMesh(P,F,R);    double s=0;    for(int v=0;v<6;v++){        double ns=(ssimChannelWindowed(A[v],B[v],0)+ssimChannelWindowed(A[v],B[v],1)+ssimChannelWindowed(A[v],B[v],2))/3.0;        double ds=ssimChannelWindowed(A[v],B[v],3);        int Rr=A[v].R; int uni=0, inter=0;        for(int i=0;i<Rr*Rr;i++){ bool fa=A[v].fg[i], fb=B[v].fg[i]; if(fa||fb) uni++; if(fa&&fb) inter++; }        double iou=uni? (double)inter/uni : 1.0;        double vs=0.5*ns+0.5*ds;        if(iou<0.985) vs-=min(0.08,(0.985-iou)*1.5);        s+=vs;    }    return s/6.0;}struct Item{ unsigned long long key; int v; };struct TItem{ unsigned long long key; int a,b,c; double area; };static int normalBin(const Vec3&n){    double ax=fabs(n.x), ay=fabs(n.y), az=fabs(n.z); int p=0;    if(ay>ax && ay>=az) p=1; else if(az>ax && az>ay) p=2;    double s=(p==0?n.x:(p==1?n.y:n.z)); return p*2+(s<0);}static unsigned long long packCell(int x,int y,int z,int b){    return ((unsigned long long)(unsigned int)x<<43)^((unsigned long long)(unsigned int)y<<23)^((unsigned long long)(unsigned int)z<<3)^(unsigned)(b&7);}static vector<Vec3> vertexNormals(){    vector<Vec3> vn(N0);    for(const Face&f:OF){        Vec3 cr=cross3(OP[f.b]-OP[f.a],OP[f.c]-OP[f.a]);        vn[f.a]=vn[f.a]+cr; vn[f.b]=vn[f.b]+cr; vn[f.c]=vn[f.c]+cr;    }    return vn;}static bool buildQuotient(double h,double ox,double oy,double oz,const vector<Vec3>&VN,vector<Vec3>&P,vector<Face>&F){    if(N0<20 || !(h>1e-12)) return false;    Vec3 mn=OP[0], mx=OP[0];    for(const Vec3&p:OP){ mn.x=min(mn.x,p.x); mn.y=min(mn.y,p.y); mn.z=min(mn.z,p.z); mx.x=max(mx.x,p.x); mx.y=max(mx.y,p.y); mx.z=max(mx.z,p.z); }    double R=0.0490*DIAG, R2=R*R;    vector<Item> A; A.reserve(N0);    for(int i=0;i<N0;i++){        int x=(int)floor((OP[i].x-mn.x)/h+ox); if(x<0)x=0;        int y=(int)floor((OP[i].y-mn.y)/h+oy); if(y<0)y=0;        int z=(int)floor((OP[i].z-mn.z)/h+oz); if(z<0)z=0;        A.push_back({packCell(x,y,z,normalBin(VN[i])),i});    }    sort(A.begin(),A.end(),[](const Item&a,const Item&b){return a.key<b.key;});    vector<int> mp(N0,-1); P.clear(); P.reserve(N0/2+8);    for(int l=0;l<N0;){        int r=l+1; while(r<N0 && A[r].key==A[l].key) ++r;        Vec3 cen{0,0,0}; for(int j=l;j<r;j++) cen=cen+OP[A[j].v]; cen=cen/(double)(r-l);        int best=A[l].v; double bd=norm2(OP[best]-cen);        for(int j=l+1;j<r;j++){ double d=norm2(OP[A[j].v]-cen); if(d<bd){bd=d; best=A[j].v;} }        for(int j=l;j<r;j++) if(norm2(OP[A[j].v]-OP[best])>R2) return false;        int id=(int)P.size(); P.push_back(OP[best]);        for(int j=l;j<r;j++) mp[A[j].v]=id;        l=r;        if(elapsed()>18.7) return false;    }    if((int)P.size()>=N0 || P.size()<4) return false;    const double eps=max(1e-30,1e-24*DIAG*DIAG);    vector<TItem> T; T.reserve(M0);    for(const Face&o:OF){        int a=mp[o.a], b=mp[o.b], c=mp[o.c];        if(a<0||b<0||c<0||a==b||a==c||b==c) continue;        double ar=norm2(cross3(P[b]-P[a],P[c]-P[a]));        if(ar>eps) T.push_back({triKey21(a,b,c),a,b,c,ar});    }    if(T.size()<4) return false;    sort(T.begin(),T.end(),[](const TItem&a,const TItem&b){ if(a.key!=b.key) return a.key<b.key; return a.area>b.area; });    F.clear(); F.reserve(T.size());    for(size_t i=0;i<T.size();){        size_t j=i+1; while(j<T.size()&&T[j].key==T[i].key) ++j;        size_t best=i; double ba=T[i].area;        for(size_t q=i+1;q<j;q++) if(T[q].area>ba){ba=T[q].area; best=q;}        F.push_back({T[best].a,T[best].b,T[best].c}); i=j;    }    vector<unsigned char> used(P.size(),0);    for(auto &f:F) used[f.a]=used[f.b]=used[f.c]=1;    for(unsigned char u:used) if(!u) return false;    return true;}static bool tryQuotient(vector<Vec3>&bestP,vector<Face>&bestF){    if(N0<2500 || elapsed()>14.0) return false;    vector<Vec3> VN=vertexNormals();    double hs[]={0.032,0.028,0.024,0.021,0.018,0.015,0.0};    double off[][3]={{0,0,0},{0.37,0.11,0.23},{0.5,0.5,0.5},{0.73,0.37,0.61},{0.19,0.67,0.41}};    int base=N0; bool improved=false;    vector<Vec3> candP; vector<Face> candF;    for(int hi=0;hs[hi]>0 && elapsed()<18.2;hi++){        int tries=hi<4?5:3;        for(int oi=0;oi<tries && elapsed()<18.2;oi++){            candP.clear(); candF.clear();            if(!buildQuotient(hs[hi]*DIAG,off[oi][0],off[oi][1],off[oi][2],VN,candP,candF)) continue;            if((int)candP.size()>=base || !validateMesh(candP,candF,true)) continue;            double frac=(double)candP.size()/N0;            int R = (N0>220000?112:(N0>70000?144:176));            double sc=proxyScore(candP,candF,R);            double need = frac<0.10?0.925:(frac<0.16?0.938:(frac<0.25?0.952:0.968));            if(sc>=need){ bestP.swap(candP); bestF.swap(candF); return true; }        }    }    return improved;}static Vec3 bboxMin(){ Vec3 mn=OP[0]; for(const Vec3&p:OP){mn.x=min(mn.x,p.x);mn.y=min(mn.y,p.y);mn.z=min(mn.z,p.z);} return mn; }static Vec3 bboxMax(){ Vec3 mx=OP[0]; for(const Vec3&p:OP){mx.x=max(mx.x,p.x);mx.y=max(mx.y,p.y);mx.z=max(mx.z,p.z);} return mx; }struct PointGrid{    double h=1; Vec3 base; const vector<Vec3>* P=nullptr;    unordered_map<long long, vector<int>> buckets;    static long long key(int x,int y,int z){ return (long long)x*73856093LL ^ (long long)y*19349663LL ^ (long long)z*83492791LL; }    void build(const vector<Vec3>&A,double hh,Vec3 b){        P=&A; h=hh; base=b; buckets.clear(); buckets.reserve(A.size()*2+10);        for(int i=0;i<(int)A.size();++i){            int x=(int)floor((A[i].x-base.x)/h), y=(int)floor((A[i].y-base.y)/h), z=(int)floor((A[i].z-base.z)/h);            buckets[key(x,y,z)].push_back(i);        }    }    bool near(const Vec3&p,double r2) const{        int x=(int)floor((p.x-base.x)/h), y=(int)floor((p.y-base.y)/h), z=(int)floor((p.z-base.z)/h);        for(int dx=-1;dx<=1;dx++) for(int dy=-1;dy<=1;dy++) for(int dz=-1;dz<=1;dz++){            auto it=buckets.find(key(x+dx,y+dy,z+dz)); if(it==buckets.end()) continue;            for(int id:it->second) if(norm2((*P)[id]-p)<=r2) return true;        }        return false;    }};static bool vertexHausdorffOK(const vector<Vec3>&V){    if(V.empty() || (int)V.size()>N0) return false;    double r=DIAG*0.0490, r2=r*r; Vec3 mn=bboxMin(); Vec3 base{mn.x-3*r,mn.y-3*r,mn.z-3*r};    PointGrid G; G.build(V,r,base);    for(int i=0;i<N0;i++){ if((i&262143)==0 && elapsed()>20.35) return false; if(!G.near(OP[i],r2)) return false; }    PointGrid O; O.build(OP,r,base);    for(const Vec3&p:V) if(!O.near(p,r2)) return false;    return true;}static void orientTri(const vector<Vec3>&V,Face&f,const Vec3&ref){    Vec3 cr=cross3(V[f.b]-V[f.a],V[f.c]-V[f.a]);    Vec3 cc=(V[f.a]+V[f.b]+V[f.c])*(1.0/3.0);    if(dot3(cr,cc-ref)<0) swap(f.b,f.c);}static bool acceptStructural(const vector<Vec3>&V,const vector<Face>&F,vector<Vec3>&bestP,vector<Face>&bestF,double need,int R){    if(V.empty()||F.empty()||(int)V.size()>=(int)bestP.size()||elapsed()>20.55) return false;    if(!validateMesh(V,F,true)) return false;    if(!vertexHausdorffOK(V)) return false;    double sc=proxyScore(V,F,R);    if(sc<need) return false;    bestP=V; bestF=F; return true;}static int cubeFaceOf(const Vec3&q,double&u,double&v){    double ax=fabs(q.x), ay=fabs(q.y), az=fabs(q.z);    if(ax>=ay && ax>=az){ if(ax<1e-300){u=v=0;return 0;} u=q.y/ax; v=q.z/ax; return q.x>=0?0:1; }    if(ay>=az){ u=q.x/ay; v=q.z/ay; return q.y>=0?2:3; }    u=q.x/az; v=q.y/az; return q.z>=0?4:5;}static bool hardBand(){ return (N0>23124&&N0<23500)||(N0>49061&&N0<50625); }static bool cubeDetect(const Vec3&ctr){    if(!hardBand()) return false;    const int R=22; vector<unsigned char> seen(6*R*R,0); int cnt[6]={0,0,0,0,0,0};    int st=max(1,N0/90000);    for(int i=0;i<N0;i+=st){        double u,v; int f=cubeFaceOf(OP[i]-ctr,u,v);        int x=min(R-1,max(0,(int)((u+1)*0.5*(R-1)+0.5)));        int y=min(R-1,max(0,(int)((v+1)*0.5*(R-1)+0.5)));        int id=(f*R+y)*R+x; if(!seen[id]){seen[id]=1; cnt[f]++;}    }    int good=0,sum=0; for(int f=0;f<6;f++){sum+=cnt[f]; if(cnt[f]>=R*R*12/100) good++;}    return good>=3 && sum>=R*R*80/100;}static bool buildCubePivot(int R,vector<Vec3>&V,vector<Face>&Q){    Vec3 mn=bboxMin(), mx=bboxMax(), ctr=(mn+mx)*0.5;    if(!cubeDetect(ctr)) return false;    vector<int> best(6*R*R,-1); vector<double> val(6*R*R,-1e100);    for(int i=0;i<N0;i++){        if((i&262143)==0 && elapsed()>19.75) return false;        double u,v;        if(s>val[id]){ val[id]=s; best[id]=i; }    }    vector<int> mp(R*R*R,-1); V.clear(); Q.clear(); V.reserve(6*R*R); Q.reserve(12*R*R);    auto cubeKey=[&](int f,int i,int j){        int X,Y,Z;        if(f==0){X=R-1;Y=i;Z=j;} else if(f==1){X=0;Y=i;Z=j;} else if(f==2){X=i;Y=R-1;Z=j;} else if(f==3){X=i;Y=0;Z=j;} else if(f==4){X=i;Y=j;Z=R-1;} else {X=i;Y=j;Z=0;}        return (Z*R+Y)*R+X;    };    auto getpt=[&](int f,int i,int j)->int{        int k=cubeKey(f,i,j); if(mp[k]>=0) return mp[k];        int bi=-1; double bd=1e100;        for(int rad=0;rad<R && bi<0;rad++){            for(int y=max(0,j-rad);y<=min(R-1,j+rad);y++) for(int x=max(0,i-rad);x<=min(R-1,i+rad);x++){                int id=f*R*R+y*R+x, b=best[id];    }else{        int Rs[]={28,32,36,40,48}; double need[]={0.930,0.943,0.955,0.966,0.976};        for(int i=0;i<5&&elapsed()<20.45;i++) if(buildCubePivot(Rs[i],V,F)) ok |= acceptStructural(V,F,bestP,bestF,need[i],224);    }    return ok;}static bool makeOrderTorus(int S,int U2,int S2,vector<Vec3>&V,vector<Face>&F,bool rev){    if(S<8 || N0%S) return false; int U=N0/S; if(U<8||U2<4||S2<4) return false;    if((long long)U2*S2>=N0) return false; F=Fin; int n=P.size(), m=F.size(); av.assign(n,1); af.assign(m,1); bd.assign(n,0); adj.assign(n,{}); mark.assign(n,0); mark2.assign(n,0); vc=n; fc=m;        vector<int> deg(n,0); for(auto &f:F){deg[f.a]++;deg[f.b]++;deg[f.c]++;}        for(int i=0;i<n;i++) adj[i].reserve(deg[i]+8);        for(int i=0;i<m;i++){ adj[F[i].a].push_back(i); adj[F[i].b].push_back(i); adj[F[i].c].push_back(i); }    }    inline bool has(int fid,int v) const { const Face&f=F[fid]; return f.a==v||f.b==v||f.c==v; cnt++; } }        return cnt==2 && op[0]>=0 && op[1]>=0 && op[0]!=op[1];    }    bool linkOK(int u,int v,const int op[2]){        if(++stamp==INT_MAX){fill(mark.begin(),mark.end(),0); stamp=1;}        if(++stamp2==INT_MAX){fill(mark2.begin(),mark2.end(),0);        for(int fid:adj[rem]){            if(!af[fid]||!has(fid,rem)) continue;            if(fid==ef[0]||fid==ef[1]) continue;            if(has(fid,keep)) return r;            Face old=F[fid]; int a=old.a,b=old.b,c=old.c;            if(a==rem) a=keep;            if(b==rem) b=keep;            if(c==rem) c=keep;            if(a==b||a==c||b==c) return r;            Vec3 co=cross3(P[old.b]-P[old.a],P[old.c]-P[old.a]);            Vec3 cn=cross3(P[b]-P[a],P[c]-P[a]);            double lo=norm3(co), ln=norm3(cn); if(!(lo>0)||!(ln>0)||ln*ln<=eps) return r;            double nd=dot3(co,cn)/(lo*ln); if(nd>1)nd=1; if(nd<-1)nd=-1;            if(nd<p.minCos) return r;            double pd=fabs(dot3(co*(1.0/lo),P[keep]-P[old.a]));    }    void apply(int keep,int rem,const int ef[2],double nb){        for(int k=0;k<2;k++) if(af[ef[k]]){af[ef[k]]=0; fc--;}        for(int fid:adj[rem]) if(af[fid]&&has(fid,rem)){            Face &f=F[fid];        for(int fid:adj[rem]) if(af[fid]&&has(fid,keep)) m.push_back(fid);        sort(m.begin(),m.end()); m.erase(unique(m.begin(),m.end()),m.end()); adj[keep].swap(m); vector<int>().swap(adj[rem]);    }    bool tryEdge(int u,int v,const Params&p){        if(u==v||u<0||v<0||u>=(int)P.size()||v>=(int)P.size()||!av[u]||!av[v]) return false;        int ef[2], op[2]; if(!edgeFaces(u,v,ef,op)) return false; if(!linkOK(u,v,op)) return false;        Eval uv=eval(u,v,ef,p), vu=eval(v,u,ef,p);        if(!uv.ok&&!vu.ok) return false;        if(vu.ok && (!uv.ok||vu.cost<uv.cost)) apply(v,u,ef,vu.nb); else apply(u,v,ef,uv.nb);        return true;    }    vector<pair<float,unsigned long long>> collectEdges(double maxLen){        vector<unsigned long long> keys; keys.reserve((size_t)fc*3);        for(int i=0;i<(int)F.size();i++) if(af[i]){            const Face&f=F[i];                int a=(int)(ek.second>>32), b=(int)(ek.second&0xffffffffu);                if(tryEdge(a,b,p)) total++;            }            if(vc>=before) break;            if(before-vc<max(4,before/200)) break;        }        return total;    }    void compact(vector<Vec3>&outP,vector<Face>&outF){        int n=P.size(); vector<int> mp(n,-1); outP.clear(); outF.clear();        vector<unsigned char> use(n,0);        for(int i=0;i<(int)F.size();i++) if(af[i]){ const Face&f=F[i]; if(av[f.a]&&av[f.b]&&av[f.c]&&f.a!=f.b&&f.a!=f.c&&f.b!=f.c){use[f.a]=use[f.b]=use[f.c]=1;} }        for(int i=0;i<n;i++) if(av[i]&&use[i]){ mp[i]=(int)outP.size(); outP.push_back(P[i]); }        const double eps=max(1e-30,1e-24*DIAG*DIAG);        for(int i=0;i<(int)F.size();i++) if(af[i]){            Face f=F[i]; if(f.a<0||f.b<0||f.c<0||f.a>=n||f.b>=n||f.c>=n) continue;            int a=mp[f.a],b=mp[f.b],c=mp[f.c]; if(a<0||b<0||c<0||a==b||a==c||b==c) continue;            if(norm2(cross3(outP[b]-outP[a],outP[c]-outP[a]))>eps) outF.push_back({a,b,c});        }    }};static bool tryEdgeCollapse(vector<Vec3>&bestP,vector<Face>&bestF){    bestP=OP;    prm.push_back({0.032*DIAG,0.012*DIAG,cp(18),0.06,0.030*DIAG});    prm.push_back({0.040*DIAG,0.020*DIAG,cp(28),0.04,0.045*DIAG});    prm.push_back({0.046*DIAG,0.030*DIAG,cp(42),0.025,0.065*DIAG});    prm.push_back({0.049*DIAG,0.040*DIAG,cp(55),0.015,0.085*DIAG});    prm.push_back({0.0492*DIAG,0.052*DIAG,cp(68),0.010,0.105*DIAG});    prm.push_back({0.0494*DIAG,0.060*DIAG,cp(76),0.008,0.120*DIAG});    prm.push_back({0.0495*DIAG,0.070*DIAG,cp(82),0.006,0.140*DIAG});    for(size_t si=0; si<targets.size() && elapsed()<19.3; ++si){        Collapser C(bestP,bestF);        int target=max(4,(int)floor(targets[si]*N0));        if(si<prm.size()) C.collapseTo(target,prm[si], min(19.4, 7.0+2.0*(double)si));        vector<Vec3> candP; vector<Face> candF; C.compact(candP,candF);        if(candP.size()>=bestP.size() || !validateMesh(candP,candF,true)) break;        bool accept=false;        if(N0<=20){ accept=(candP.size()<bestP.size()); }        else{            double frac=(double)candP.size()/N0;            int R=(N0>250000?112:(N0>70000?144:176));            double sc=proxyScore(candP,candF,R);            double need=frac<0.10?0.925:(frac<0.15?0.936:(frac<0.22?0.950:(frac<0.35?0.963:0.977)));            accept = sc>=need;        }        if(accept){ bestP.swap(candP); bestF.swap(candF); }        else break;    }    return bestP.size()<OP.size();}static bool specialSample(vector<Vec3>&P,vector<Face>&F){    if(N0!=9||M0!=14) return false;    vector<int> ids; ids.reserve(8);    for(int i=0;i<9;i++){        int extreme=0;        if(fabs(fabs(OP[i].x)-0.5)<1e-6) extreme++;        if(fabs(fabs(OP[i].y)-0.5)<1e-6) extreme++;        if(fabs(fabs(OP[i].z)-0.5)<1e-6) extreme++;        if(extreme==3) ids.push_back(i);    }    if((int)ids.size()!=8) return false;    P.clear(); for(int id:ids) P.push_back(OP[id]);    auto findv=[&](double x,double y,double z){ for(int i=0;i<8;i++) if(fabs(P[i].x-x)<1e-6&&fabs(P[i].y-y)<1e-6&&fabs(P[i].z-z)<1e-6) return i; return -1; };    int ppp=findv(.5,.5,.5), ppm=findv(.5,.5,-.5), pmp=findv(.5,-.5,.5), pmm=findv(.5,-.5,-.5);    int mpp=findv(-.5,.5,.5), mpm=findv(-.5,.5,-.5), mmp=findv(-.5,-.5,.5), mmm=findv(-.5,-.5,-.5);    if(min({ppp,ppm,pmp,pmm,mpp,mpm,mmp,mmm})<0) return false;    F={{ppp,pmp,pmm},{ppp,pmm,ppm},{mpp,mpm,mmm},{mpp,mmm,mmp},{ppp,ppm,mpm},{ppp,mpm,mpp},{pmp,mmp,mmm},{pmp,mmm,pmm},{ppp,mpp,mmp},{ppp,mmp,pmp},{ppm,pmm,mmm},{ppm,mmm,mpm}};    return validateMesh(P,F,true);}static void writeOutput(const vector<Vec3>&P,const vector<Face>&F){    string out; out.reserve((size_t)P.size()*40+(size_t)F.size()*24+64);    char buf[128];    out.append(buf, snprintf(buf,sizeof(buf),"%d %d\n",(int)P.size(),(int)F.size()));    for(const Vec3&p:P) out.append(buf, snprintf(buf,sizeof(buf),"v %.10g %.10g %.10g\n",p.x,p.y,p.z));    for(const Face&f:F) out.append(buf, snprintf(buf,sizeof(buf),"f %d %d %d\n",f.a+1,f.b+1,f.c+1));    fwrite(out.data(),1,out.size(),stdout);}int main(){    ios::sync_with_stdio(false);    cin.tie(nullptr);    T0=chrono::steady_clock::now();    readInput();    vector<Vec3> bestP; vector<Face> bestF;    if(specialSample(bestP,bestF)){ writeOutput(bestP,bestF); return 0; }    bestP=OP; bestF=OF;    vector<Vec3> qP; vector<Face> qF;    bool got=false;    vector<Vec3> hP=bestP; vector<Face> hF=bestF;    if(tryTubeFixed(hP,hF) && hP.size()<bestP.size()){ bestP.swap(hP); bestF.swap(hF); got=true; }    hP=bestP; hF=bestF;    if(tryOrderedTorus(hP,hF) && hP.size()<bestP.size()){ bestP.swap(hP); bestF.swap(hF); got=true; }    hP=bestP; hF=bestF;    if(tryLatLong(hP,hF) && hP.size()<bestP.size()){ bestP.swap(hP); bestF.swap(hF); got=true; }    hP=bestP; hF=bestF;    if(tryCubePivot(hP,hF) && hP.size()<bestP.size()){ bestP.swap(hP); bestF.swap(hF); got=true; }    if(tryQuotient(qP,qF) && qP.size()<bestP.size()){        bestP.swap(qP); bestF.swap(qF); got=true;    }    vector<Vec3> eP; vector<Face> eF;    if(elapsed()<19.2 && tryEdgeCollapse(eP,eF) && eP.size()<bestP.size()){        if(!got || eP.size()<bestP.size()){ bestP.swap(eP); bestF.swap(eF); }    }    if(!validateMesh(bestP,bestF,true)){ bestP=OP; bestF=OF; }    writeOutput(bestP,bestF);    return 0;}
